testcase.name: test_file_upload_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_product_layouts.py:285: in test_file_upload_success assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter96_product_layouts.py:328: in test_pricing_calc_basic assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Pricing calc failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Pricing calc failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
